examples.title: OnClickListener with Anonymous Inner Class
examples.description: Standard way to handle button click using anonymous inner class
examples.explanation: This creates an anonymous implementation of View.OnClickListener interface. The onClick() method is called when the button is tapped. This approach is concise and keeps listener code close to where it's used.

examples.title: OnTouchListener for Drag Detection
examples.description: Implementing drag functionality using OnTouchListener with coordinate tracking
examples.explanation: Tracks initial touch position in ACTION_DOWN, calculates delta movement in ACTION_MOVE, and applies translation to the view. Returns true to consume events and prevent click generation.

examples.title: GestureDetector for Swipe Detection
examples.description: Using GestureDetector.SimpleOnGestureListener to detect swipe gestures
examples.explanation: GestureDetector handles complex gesture recognition internally. onFling is called when a quick swipe is detected. The method receives velocity information making gesture detection more accurate than manual coordinate checking.
